stocks.impact_theory: Oracle reported exceptional Q3 FY2026 earnings with EPS $1.79 vs $1.70 expected, revenue $17.2B, cloud growth 44%. AI infrastructure demand strong, raised FY2027 outlook. Economic: boosts tech spending confidence amid macro fears. Psychology: counters market selloff, attracts rotation to quality tech. Historical: similar to 2023 AI rally post-earnings. Analogies: lighthouse in storm (stable amid volatility); rocket fuel for AI narrative.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat and AI guidance shift sentiment positive despite market down 1.3% on oil/geopolitics. X sentiment positive on AI, web news highlights surge.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/long for +10% gains on continued AI hype, target $180.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid short, momentum strong; potential -5% pullback if market worsens.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Broader tech selloff from rates/oil; high valuation.

stocks.justification: Strong earnings beat, volume spike, historical post-earnings moves confirm high confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: Oil prices surged on US-Iran tensions, Strait of Hormuz disruptions, IEA warns largest supply shock. Implications: higher energy costs fuel inflation, stagflation fears. Psychology: flight to energy stocks amid risk-off. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine invasion oil rally. Analogies: safe harbor in geopolitical storm; rising tide lifting energy boats.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil above $100 drives XOM up vs market down; X posts highlight energy strength, web confirms sector rotation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for +5% on sustained oil rally, target $160.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if reserves flood cools oil, potential -3%.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: SPR releases, de-escalation in Middle East.

stocks.justification: Clear macro tailwind but dependent on geopolitics volatility.

stocks.impact_theory: Macro pressures from oil spike, rate cut pricing out, YTD -? but slipped 0.5% today. Bubble fears resurface. Implications: higher rates hurt growth stocks. Psychology: profit-taking in overvalued AI leader. Parallels: 2022 rate hike tech crash. Analogies: Icarus flying too close to valuation sun; dam bursting on hype.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Market wipeout $820B, sentiment shift to risk-off; X YTD declines, web bubble worries.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Dip buy for rebound +5% if AI holds.

stocks.impact_theory: Geopolitical oil rise hurts EV adoption, higher rates pressure growth. YTD -11%. Implications: delays rate cuts, squeezes margins. Psychology: risk-off hits high beta. Parallels: 2022 EV correction. Analogies: EV in gas guzzler world; balloon deflating on pinprick.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Macro sensitivity, X YTD down, no positive news amid selloff.

stocks.impact_theory: Earnings after close March 12, anticipation amid market turmoil. AI features key. Implications: tests tech resilience. Psychology: pre-earnings volatility up. Parallels: past quarters mixed. Analogies: sword of Damocles (earnings); calm before storm.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Upcoming earnings, X mentions; market down but AI potential.
